content:
I am a senior student at KAIST co-majoring in Computer Science and Brain Engineering. Currently advised by professor Seunghoon Hong, I am studying machine learning and computer vision.
My research interests include learning visual concepts with less supervision and learning to reason about objects and their interactions in a scene. Until last year, I was advised by professor Se-Bum Paik, and conducted a computational neuroscience research on the development of visual circuits in the absence of sensory experience.
In my free time, I enjoy listening to music - and composing them as well! My favorite musicians are Radiohead, Carpenters, 가을방학, and Ryuichi Sakamoto. My friends and I are running an independent composer group named Regular Daydream Club (정기적 멍때리기 클럽). Along with our own work, we collaborate with webcomic artist Ju Hwan Lee. You can view some of our work here, and here.
summary:
I am a senior student at KAIST co-majoring in Computer Science and Brain Engineering. Currently advised by professor Seunghoon Hong, I am studying machine learning and computer vision.
My research interests include learning visual concepts with less supervision and learning to reason about objects and their interactions in a scene.
title: Jinwoo Kim
